notes.autoUpdates: Use About to check manually. Automatic checks only show the updater prompt on launch when this is enabled.
notes.diffToolNotConfigured: No known difftool is configured. Compare actions may not work unless you have configured one manually in your git config.
notes.gitConfiguration: These options update your global Git configuration (equivalent to `git config --global ...`).
notes.gitExecutable: This is the Git binary Gitmun is using. Saving it pins Gitmun to that executable; clear it to return to automatic lookup.
notes.gitOptions: These options control Git behaviour in Gitmun.
notes.credentialHelper: Leave blank to use Git's existing helper lookup. Use values such as `manager`, `manager-core`, `cache`, or `store`.
notes.gpgProgram: Leave blank to use Git's default GPG lookup. On Windows, Gitmun also searches common Git for Windows and GnuPG install folders.
notes.lineEndings: Changing line ending conversion can make many files appear modified until the repository is renormalised.
notes.linuxGraphics: Takes effect on next launch. Use "Maximum compatibility" if you see rendering crashes or a blank window.
notes.commitMessageRecommendedLength: Recommended maximum for the first line of a commit message. Set to 0 to disable.
notes.repoOpenBehaviour: Controls in-app repository opens, including recent repositories. Shell and file manager launches always open a new window.
notes.toolPathMissing: {{tool}} could not be found automatically. Saving will fail until you choose its executable.
notes.toolPathSearch: Gitmun searches PATH first, then common Windows install folders. If that fails, choose the executable manually.
notes.updateEndpoint: Advanced setting. Gitmun checks this latest.json URL for updates. Do not change this unless you know what you're doing.
notes.updatesManaged: Updates are managed by this platform package channel.
notes.vscodeMergeEditor: {{tool}}'s merge editor writes the result file when closed, so conflicts will be marked as resolved even if you close without explicitly accepting a side. Use the Accept buttons inside the editor to choose which version to keep.

placeholders.defaultBranch: Leave blank to use Git's default
placeholders.credentialHelper: Leave blank for Git's default helper lookup
placeholders.gitExecutable: Auto-detect Git or choose an executable
placeholders.gpgProgram: Leave blank for Git's default, or choose gpg

status.diffToolPathFailed: Failed to load diff tool path: {{message}}
status.gitExecutableReset: Cleared Git executable override and returned to automatic lookup.
status.gitExecutableResetFailed: Failed to reset Git executable override: {{message}}

switches.autoCheckUpdates: Automatically check for updates on launch
switches.platformAvatars: Try platform-specific avatars first (e.g. GitHub for github.com remotes)
switches.wrapDiffLines: Wrap long lines in diff view
